title: Fire Destroys Sacred Buddhist Hall in Japan that Housed ‘Eternal Flame’
summary_full: The flame, which spiritual leaders say has been continuously lit for more than 1,200 years, was salvaged after the blaze and moved to a different site.
summary_public: The flame, which spiritual leaders say has been continuously lit for more than 1,200 years, was salvaged after the blaze and moved to a different site.
